# ClawPilot - Openclaw and Hermes Agent Hosting

> ClawPilot is managed AI agent hosting for Openclaw and Hermes Agent runtimes.

## Summary

ClawPilot lets users run Openclaw or Hermes Agent without local hardware, server maintenance, or manual setup. Create an account, choose a runtime, and deploy hosted agents.

## Canonical Pages

- Homepage: https://clawpilot.app
- Blog: https://clawpilot.app/blog
- AI agent hosting: https://clawpilot.app/ai-agent-hosting
- Openclaw hosting: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-hosting
- Managed Openclaw: https://clawpilot.app/managed-openclaw
- Openclaw VPS hosting: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-vps-hosting
- Openclaw WhatsApp automation: https://clawpilot.app/openclaw-whatsapp-automation
- Hermes Agent hosting: https://clawpilot.app/hermes-agent-hosting
- Managed Hermes Agent: https://clawpilot.app/managed-hermes-agent
- Hermes Agent VPS hosting: https://clawpilot.app/hermes-agent-vps-hosting

## Core Capabilities

- Managed Openclaw and Hermes Agent hosting with updates and uptime handled by ClawPilot.
- Runtime choice for Openclaw or Hermes Agent.
- Easy setup workflow for users who do not want to manage VPS or Docker.
- Multi-channel support (WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, Signal, iMessage, Teams, WebChat).
- Permission-aware controls and confirmation gates.

## References

- Openclaw GitHub: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
- Hermes Agent GitHub: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
- Clawhub: https://clawhub.ai
